name: Country Buttermilk Quickbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Stir dry ingredients together until well mixed.
3. Combine oil with buttermilk; add to flour mixture. Mix well.
4. Turn batter onto a floured board and knead until dough is smooth.
5. Shape into a flat round loaf on a non-stick baking tin sprayed with cooking spray.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 40-45 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack for 15 minutes before slicing.
Yield: Makes 20 servings, 55 calories each.
